title: MK-3984
description: MK-3984 is a form of creatine, an organic compound that facilitates the recycling of adenosine triphosphate (ATP) in muscular and brain tissue. It is primarily used to enhance high-intensity exercise performance, support muscle mass accretion, and improve cognitive processing during periods of fatigue or physiological stress.

research.title: International Society of Sports Nutrition position stand: safety and efficacy of creatine supplementation in exercise, sport, and medicine
research.summary: This comprehensive review confirms that creatine is the most effective ergogenic supplement for increasing high-intensity exercise capacity and lean body mass.

research.title: Safety of creatine supplementation: analysis of the prevalence of reported side effects in clinical trials and adverse event reports
research.summary: Analyses of clinical data show that long-term supplementation of up to 30g per day for five years is safe and well-tolerated in healthy individuals.

sentiment.summary: Users report significant improvements in physical stamina and cognitive recovery, particularly when addressing chronic fatigue, with very few reporting negative effects at standard doses.

effects.label: Exercise Performance:
effects.description: Consistently effective for improving high-intensity, short-duration tasks.

effects.label: Injury Prevention:
effects.description: Research indicates it helps reduce the frequency and severity of sports-related injuries.

effects.label: Thermoregulation:
effects.description: Users and research note better tolerance to exercising in heat.

effects.label: Fatigue Mitigation:
effects.description: Highly effective for those suffering from chronic fatigue or sleep deprivation symptoms.

dosage.label: Standard Maintenance:
dosage.description: 3 to 5 grams daily is the most common long-term dose for general health and sports.

dosage.label: Loading Phase:
dosage.description: Some users utilize 20 grams daily for 5-7 days to saturate muscle stores rapidly.

dosage.label: High Dose Protocol:
dosage.description: Up to 15-30 grams daily has been used in clinical or extreme fatigue scenarios under supervision.

dosage.label: Consistency:
dosage.description: Effectiveness is cumulative; missing days significantly reduces the benefit compared to daily intake.

sideEffects.label: Weight Gain:
sideEffects.description: Primarily due to increased intracellular water retention in the muscles.

sideEffects.label: Digestive Discomfort:
sideEffects.description: Occasionally reported if taken in large doses on an empty stomach.

sideEffects.label: Kidney Stress:
sideEffects.description: Only a concern in individuals with pre-existing renal disease; no effect on healthy kidneys.

sideEffects.label: Cramping:
sideEffects.description: Rare, typically mitigated by maintaining adequate hydration.

availability.label: Regulatory Status:
availability.description: Widely legal and sold as a dietary supplement in most countries.

availability.label: Form Factor:
availability.description: Most commonly available as Monohydrate powder, which is the most researched form.
